description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with a flared end for improved grip and control. The handle is a medium brown color, showing a natural wood grain texture. The axe head is made of dark gray metal, with a broad, single-edged blade that curves downward and a rounded poll on the opposite side. The blade has a pronounced beard, extending the cutting edge below the handle for increased versatility. The head is mounted onto the handle in a traditional style, with the wood passing through the eye of the blade. No visible markings, engravings, or labels are present on either the handle or the blade.
description: A hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a broad, single-edged metal blade featuring a pronounced beard. The axe head is dark gray, and the handle is medium brown with visible wood grain.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the broad, curved metal blade with a pronounced beard.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the rounded end of the handle and the narrow profile of the axe head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle's curvature and the full shape of the blade, including the beard and poll.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the flared end of the handle and the alignment of the blade with the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a flared end, oval cross-section, smooth grip, and visible wood grain.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, broad metal blade with a pronounced beard and rounded poll, no decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the handle passing through the eye of the blade.
